---
ID: US-SLD-003
Title: Promote Slide Parser Security and Normalization Stories to Canonical Coverage
Status: Done
Verified: true
Backdated: 2026-04-24
---

As a QA lead
I want the implemented slide parser hardening capabilities represented in canonical story coverage
So shipped security and normalization behavior is not hidden in side-backlog files

Acceptance Criteria:
- [x] Existing capabilities from `US-O13`..`US-O16` are mapped to canonical slide story IDs.
- [x] Traceability and verification audits include explicit slide parser entries (warnings, sanitization, normalization, regression checks).
- [x] Story IDs used in smoke tests and parser evidence are consistent with canonical IDs.
- [x] No implemented slide parser behavior remains "orphaned" from story traceability.
